name: Commerce
description: Adds a product catalogue with its own admin page and table, a themed /shop page, and fills the Business theme's Featured Products / hero Shop button through hooks. Cart and checkout are intentionally out of scope for this first version.
author: Beyond Plus

settings.name: currency
settings.label: Currency label
settings.help: Shown after each price, e.g. MMK, Ks, $.

settings.name: shop_enabled
settings.label: Enable the /shop page and hero Shop button
